sections.paragraph:
Ἄλκη, ης, ἡ Alce (Isaeus 6, 19; 20; 55; Diod S 5, 49, 3; CIG 3268 [Smyrna]; 7064; Lat. Alce is more freq. [CIL III 2477; VI 20852; IX 3201 al.]) a woman of Smyrna ISm 13:2; IPol 8:3; MPol 17:2.

Isaeus Isaeus , V–IV b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

Lat. Lat. = Latin

freq. freq. = frequent(ly)

CIL CIL = Corpus Inscriptionum Latinarum—List 3

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

ISm ISm = Ignatius to the Smyrnaeans, I–II a.d.—List 1

IPol IPol = Ignatius to Polycarp—List 1

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 44
